heading: Python Instructor / Machine Learning Trainer
title: Python & Machine Learning Mentor (Beginner to Advanced)
shortDesc: Teach Python from fundamentals to advanced concepts and guide students in building real-world machine learning projects.
longDesc: We are looking for a passionate and skilled Python Instructor who can teach students from absolute beginner level to advanced Python programming. The role involves delivering structured lessons covering core Python concepts, data structures, object-oriented programming, and advanced topics such as file handling, APIs, and performance optimization. The instructor will also introduce students to machine learning concepts and guide them through hands-on projects including data preprocessing, model building, evaluation, and deployment. The ideal candidate should be able to simplify complex concepts, mentor students, and help them build industry-ready skills through real-world applications.
responsibilities: Teach Python programming from scratch including syntax, control structures, functions, and modules
Explain data structures, algorithms, and object-oriented programming in Python
Cover advanced topics such as file handling, exception handling, APIs, and libraries
Introduce machine learning concepts including supervised and unsupervised learning
Guide students in implementing ML models using libraries like NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn, and TensorFlow/PyTorch
Design and mentor hands-on projects such as classification, regression, and data analysis tasks
Provide assignments, evaluate student progress, and give constructive feedback
Assist students in debugging code and improving problem-solving skills
Stay updated with latest industry trends in Python and machine learning
Help students build portfolios and prepare for technical interviews

heading: Advanced Java Programming Instructor
title: Java Trainer (Core to Advanced & Enterprise Development)
shortDesc: Teach Core Java to Advanced Java including frameworks and real-world backend development projects.
longDesc: We are seeking an experienced Java Instructor who can teach Core Java fundamentals and advance learners toward enterprise-level development. The role includes covering object-oriented programming, data structures, multithreading, exception handling, collections framework, and JVM internals. The instructor will also train students in advanced Java technologies such as JDBC, Servlets, JSP, Spring Boot, and RESTful API development. The goal is to prepare students for backend engineering roles through structured learning and hands-on project development using real-world scenarios.
responsibilities: Teach Core Java concepts including syntax, OOP principles, and memory management
Explain advanced topics like multithreading, concurrency, collections, and exception handling
Train students in JDBC, Servlets, JSP, and enterprise Java development
Introduce Spring Framework and Spring Boot for backend development
Guide students in building RESTful APIs and backend systems
Design real-world projects such as e-commerce backend, authentication systems, and CRUD applications
Provide coding assignments, assessments, and project reviews
Help students debug complex Java applications and optimize performance
Prepare students for backend developer interviews and industry roles
Stay updated with modern Java ecosystem tools and best practices

heading: Spring Boot Backend Development Instructor
title: Spring Boot & Microservices Trainer
shortDesc: Teach Spring Boot from basics to advanced backend development including microservices and REST APIs.
longDesc: We are looking for an experienced Spring Boot instructor who can train students in modern backend development using Java and Spring ecosystem. The role involves teaching Spring Core, Spring Boot, Spring MVC, Spring Data JPA, and building scalable RESTful APIs. The instructor will also cover database integration, authentication and authorization (JWT, Spring Security), and microservices architecture. The goal is to equip learners with industry-ready backend development skills through practical, project-based learning using real-world applications and deployment strategies.
responsibilities: Teach Spring Core concepts including Dependency Injection and Inversion of Control
Train students in Spring Boot application development from setup to deployment
Explain REST API design and implementation using Spring MVC
Cover Spring Data JPA and database integration with MySQL/PostgreSQL
Teach Spring Security including authentication and JWT-based authorization
Introduce microservices architecture and inter-service communication
Guide students in building real-world projects like e-commerce and user management systems
Provide hands-on coding exercises and project-based assignments
Help students debug backend applications and improve performance
Prepare learners for backend developer interviews and industry standards

heading: React Frontend Development Instructor
title: React.js (Frontend Development) Trainer
shortDesc: Teach React.js from basics to advanced frontend development with real-world project building.
longDesc: We are looking for a skilled React instructor who can teach frontend development using modern JavaScript and React ecosystem. The role involves guiding students from foundational concepts like HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to advanced React topics including components, hooks, state management, routing, and performance optimization. The instructor will also cover API integration, Redux or Context API, and best practices for building scalable and responsive web applications. The goal is to prepare students for frontend developer roles through hands-on projects and real-world UI development scenarios.
responsibilities: Teach core frontend fundamentals including HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Explain React fundamentals including components, props, and state
Train students in React Hooks such as useState, useEffect, and custom hooks
Teach routing using React Router for multi-page applications
Guide state management using Context API and Redux
Integrate REST APIs and handle asynchronous data in React applications
Help students build real-world projects like dashboards, e-commerce UI, and social apps
Focus on responsive design and modern UI/UX best practices
Provide coding assignments, code reviews, and debugging support
Prepare students for frontend interviews and industry-ready development skills
